name: Agda
run: vehicle compile -s spec.vcl -t Agda -o Agda.agda -c Marabou.queries

name: Rocq
run: vehicle compile -s spec.vcl -t Rocq -o Rocq.v -c Marabou.queries

name: RocqVerify
run: vehicle compile -s spec.vcl -t Rocq -o Rocq.v -c Marabou.queries && rocq compile -w none -vok Rocq.v

name: Marabou
run: vehicle compile -s spec.vcl -t MarabouQueries -o Marabou.queries/ --network andGate:fake.onnx
